# --- Google Cloud (pinned to avoid pip backtracking) ---
# These packages have complex cross-constraints that cause 20+ minute pip hangs
# when left unpinned. Pin the full stack together for reproducible, fast builds.
google-cloud-storage==2.18.2
google-cloud-logging==3.11.3
protobuf==5.26.1
proto-plus==1.24.0
